items.headline: Semarchy at Snowflake Summit 2026: MDM as a Snowflake Native App, T. Rowe Price session
items.summary: Semarchy exhibits at Booth #1301, running MDM as a Snowflake Native App; co-presents Party Master 360 session with T. Rowe Price.

items.headline: MathCo hosts 'AI and Aperitifs' invite-only event at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: MathCo hosts an invite-only evening at Shelby's Rooftop on June 3 alongside Snowflake Summit 2026 to connect with data and AI leaders.

items.headline: Arango Showcases Live Contextual Data Layer for Enterprise AI at Snowflake Summit 2026 (AutoGraph + Virtual Graph preview)
items.summary: Arango unveils AutoGraph and previews a zero-egress Virtual Graph for Snowflake at Summit 2026, building a Live Contextual Data Layer for enterprise AI.

items.headline: Ataccama launches data products and joins Open Semantic Interchange to deliver trusted context for AI on Snowflake
items.summary: At Summit 26, Ataccama launched data product capabilities with a Data Trust Index, served via MCP into Snowflake CoWork/CoCo, and joined OSI.

items.headline: AtScale Announces Integration for Snowflake Semantic Views to Extend Governed Metrics to Power BI and Excel
items.summary: At Summit 26, AtScale unveiled Snowflake Semantic Views XMLA Endpoint (private preview), extending governed Snowflake metrics to Power BI and Excel without data movement.

items.headline: Blend Acquires In516ht, a Snowflake Elite Partner, Expanding Enterprise AI Capabilities Globally
items.summary: On Summit 26's opening day, Blend360 acquired In516ht, a Snowflake Elite Partner, expanding its data engineering and AI capabilities within the Snowflake ecosystem.

items.headline: BlueCloud Named 2026 Snowflake CoCo Catalyst Partner of the Year - Services AMS Adoption
items.summary: At Summit 26, BlueCloud was named 2026 Snowflake CoCo Catalyst Partner of the Year for driving the most Snowflake CoCo adoption across the Americas.

items.headline: CDW named 2026 AMER Snowflake Resale Partner of the Year
items.summary: CDW received the 2026 AMER Snowflake Resale Partner of the Year award, announced during Snowflake Summit 2026 in San Francisco.

items.headline: Snowflake and Collibra Expand Integration to Bring Governed Business Context and Semantics Across the Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: Announced at Summit 26: new bi-directional integration syncing Collibra governed metadata and OSI semantic models with Snowflake; preview now, broader GA Q3 2026.

items.headline: Cognizant wins 2026 Snowflake Partner Award; debuts JPMC Acquirer Foundation Model on Snowflake
items.summary: At Summit 26 Cognizant earned a 2026 Snowflake Partner Award and, with JPMC, introduced an Acquirer Foundation Model data intelligence platform built on Snowflake.

items.headline: Cyera + Snowflake: govern every agent, secure every dataset, move at the speed of AI
items.summary: At Summit 26 Cyera announced Snowflake Access Governance remediation (GA), Cortex AI agent discovery (preview), and natural-language risk analysis via Cortex Analyst.

items.headline: DAS42 Named 2026 Marketing & Advertising Snowflake Services Partner of the Year
items.summary: Announced at Summit 26, DAS42 won Snowflake's 2026 Marketing & Advertising Services Partner of the Year for identity resolution and AI work on Snowflake.

items.headline: What we announced at Snowflake Summit and why it matters (Fivetran + dbt merger, dbt Core v2.0)
items.summary: At Summit 2026, dbt Labs and Fivetran became one company, unveiled dbt Core v2.0 alpha and dbt State; named 2026 Snowflake Data Integration Partner of the Year.

items.headline: dltHub named 2026 Startup Program Snowflake Product Partner of the Year
items.summary: dltHub (makers of open-source dlt Python library) won the 2026 Startup Program Snowflake Product Partner of the Year award; also launched its dltHub pro offering around Summit.

items.headline: Elementum Named 2026 Snowflake Product Partner of the Year - Agentic Transformation
items.summary: At Summit 2026 Elementum won 2026 Snowflake Product Partner of the Year for Agentic Transformation; Snowflake Ventures invested in its agentic AI platform; License Patrol native app on Marketplace.

items.headline: evolv Consulting Named 2026 AMER Snowflake Services Growth Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Snowflake Summit 2026, evolv won 2026 AMER Snowflake Services Growth Partner of the Year and CoCo Catalyst Partner of the Year, with booth #1201 and two sessions.

items.headline: Flexor Announces Integration with Snowflake to Bring AI-Ready Unstructured Data Context into the Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: At Snowflake Summit 2026, Flexor unveiled native integration of its AI Context Engine (ACE) into Snowflake, turning unstructured data into AI-ready context; booth #2705.

items.headline: Snowflake in Glean Assistant now generally available; Glean named 2026 AMER Snowflake Product Innovation Partner of the Year
items.summary: GA of Snowflake as native data source in Glean Assistant via Cortex Analyst; Glean named 2026 AMER Snowflake Product Innovation Partner of the Year.

items.headline: Hightouch named 2026 Marketers and Advertisers Snowflake Product Partner of the Year at Summit 2026
items.summary: At Snowflake Summit 2026, Hightouch won 2026 Marketers & Advertisers Product Partner of the Year for its composable CDP and agentic marketing on Snowflake.

items.headline: IBM named a new Zero-Copy Integration partner and wins 2026 AMER Snowflake Services Innovation Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Summit 2026, Snowflake named IBM a new Zero-Copy Integration partner; IBM also won 2026 AMER Snowflake Services Innovation Partner of the Year.

items.headline: Immuta Launches New Agentic Data Access Capabilities on Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: At Summit 2026, Immuta launched agentic data access capabilities powered by Snowflake Cortex AI, governing AI-agent data access with zero standing privileges.

items.headline: Kumo Named 2026 Snowflake Product Partner of the Year for AI Tooling
items.summary: Snowflake named Kumo its 2026 Product Partner of the Year for AI Tooling, recognized at Snowflake Summit 26 partner awards.

items.headline: Matia Launches on Snowflake Marketplace, Bringing Unified Data Operations to the AI Data Cloud
items.summary: At Summit 26, Matia launched on Snowflake Marketplace, offering unified ETL, reverse ETL, observability, and catalog DataOps directly on Snowflake.

items.headline: Merkle showcases Snowflake-native identity apps and MCP composable identity session at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: At Summit Booth #2527, Merkle (Snowflake Elite/Intelligence launch partner) demos Snowflake-native identity resolution and runs an MCP composable-identity session.

items.headline: Microsoft OneLake and Snowflake interoperability is now generally available, including a Snowflake item in OneLake
items.summary: At Summit 26, OneLake-Snowflake Iceberg interoperability reached GA, a Snowflake-branded OneLake item entered preview, plus deeper Microsoft Foundry integration.

items.headline: Monte Carlo named 2026 Data Governance Snowflake Product Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Summit 2026, Snowflake named Monte Carlo Data Governance Product Partner of the Year for its data and AI observability across Cortex Agents.

items.headline: NTT DATA is Blue Square sponsor at Snowflake Summit 2026 with Federated AI Mesh demo and two 2026 Snowflake Partner Awards
items.summary: Booth #1202 demos and a breakout session; with Mitsui builds a Snowflake 'Federated AI Mesh'; won two 2026 Snowflake APJ partner awards.

items.headline: phData Named 2026 Global Snowflake Services AI Partner of the Year and 2026 AMER Snowflake Services Implementation Partner of the Year
items.summary: phData won two Snowflake Partner of the Year awards at Summit 26, its seventh consecutive year, spotlighting a Cortex-based Data Modeling Agent.

items.headline: Posit Wins Two Snowflake Partner of the Year Awards for Data Science
items.summary: Posit won Global Product Innovation and AI/ML Data Science Tooling Partner of the Year at Summit 26 for its R/Python Native App on Snowflake.

items.headline: RelationalAI Closes the AI Value Gap with New Agentic Decision Intelligence Capabilities for the Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: At Snowflake Summit 26, RelationalAI launched the Rel App plus prescriptive/predictive reasoners, Snowflake CoWork conversational decision intelligence, and push-button post-training, native to Snowflake.

items.headline: Snowflake CoCo adds Retool integration to build AI apps on governed Snowflake data
items.summary: At Summit 26, Snowflake's CoCo coding agent gains a Retool integration so teams build AI-powered apps on governed Snowflake data.

items.headline: RudderStack launches RudderAI at Snowflake Summit 26
items.summary: RudderAI suite of CLI, MCP tools and five agents for agentic customer-data workflows on Snowflake, launched at Summit 26.

items.headline: Snowflake open framework adds Salesforce zero-copy and MCP integrations
items.summary: Summit 26 framework lets Salesforce data be accessed without replication via Zero-Copy Integrations and Model Context Protocol connectors.

items.headline: Sigma Named 2026 Business Intelligence Snowflake Product Partner of the Year and 2026 EMEA Snowflake Product Growth Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Summit 2026 Sigma won 2026 BI Snowflake Product Partner of the Year (fourth straight year) and EMEA Product Growth Partner of the Year.

items.headline: Slalom named 2026 Global Snowflake Services Innovation Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Summit 2026 Slalom won Global Services Innovation Partner of the Year; present at Booth #1109 with a Capital One Iceberg migration session.

items.headline: Spaulding Ridge Named 2026 Media & Entertainment Snowflake Services Partner of the Year at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Spaulding Ridge sponsors Summit 2026 with live Openflow accelerator and CoCo/Snowflake Intelligence demos; recognized as 2026 Media & Entertainment Services Partner of the Year.

items.headline: ThoughtSpot Expands Governed Enterprise AI with Snowflake Cortex AI and Semantic Views
items.summary: At Summit 26, ThoughtSpot integrates Spotter and its agents with Snowflake Cortex Analyst/Agents and Semantic Views, adding Cortex visualizations and BYO-LLM.

items.headline: TransUnion Named 2026 Media and Entertainment Snowflake Product Partner of the Year
items.summary: TransUnion won Snowflake's 2026 Media & Entertainment Product Partner of the Year award at Summit 26 for identity resolution solutions on Snowflake.

items.headline: Tredence Named 2026 Retail & Consumer Goods Snowflake Services Partner of the Year
items.summary: Tredence won Snowflake's 2026 Retail & CG Services Partner of the Year for the second year; showcased IRIS agentic framework at Summit Booth #2417.

items.headline: TrustLogix Launches TrustAI Integration with Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: TrustLogix launched TrustAI for Snowflake Cortex AI, governing agent/tool access, plus TrustAI Guardian and a free Data Security Scanner on Snowflake Marketplace.

items.headline: Workato at Snowflake Summit 2026: Data Orchestration to Activation with Enterprise MCP & Agentic AI
items.summary: Workato runs a Summit session (Tue June 2, booth #1108) on making Snowflake data AI-ready via secure, governed MCP servers and agents.

items.headline: Coalesce hosts joint demo at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 1204) on unified DataOps + transformation
items.summary: Coalesce exhibits at Booth 1204 and runs a June 2 joint demo showing move, monitor and activate data on Snowflake with its transformation layer.

items.headline: Insider One launches Zero Copy Segmentation for Snowflake
items.summary: Insider One launched Zero Copy Segmentation, a native Snowflake integration letting marketers build and activate audiences from Snowflake data without copying it.

items.headline: kipi.ai named 2026 Telecom Snowflake Services Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Summit 2026, Snowflake named kipi.ai (part of Capgemini) the 2026 Telecom Snowflake Services Partner of the Year among its partner award winners.

items.headline: OneSix recognized as a CoCo global partner during the Snowflake Summit 26 Platform Keynote
items.summary: OneSix exhibited at Summit 26 (booth 2304) and was named a Snowflake CoCo global partner during the Platform Keynote following its onesix.ai rebrand.

items.headline: Estuary showcases real-time Snowflake data integration at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 1204)
items.summary: Estuary exhibited at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 1204), demoing real-time CDC/ETL pipelines that move data into Snowflake without batch-vs-streaming tradeoffs.

items.headline: Hevo Data hosts data-leader wind-down event at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Hevo, with Prolim and Lightdash, hosts an exclusive Snowflake Summit 2026 evening event for data and analytics leaders at Hilton SF.

items.headline: Capital One Software announces new observability and AI-powered optimization capabilities for Slingshot
items.summary: Slingshot gains context-aware query optimization, duplicate pipeline detection and a Data Explorer to drive system-wide Snowflake cost and performance efficiency.

items.headline: Fivetran + dbt Labs Complete Merger to Create the Data Infrastructure for Trusted AI Agents
items.summary: Fivetran closed its dbt Labs merger on June 1, 2026, timed to Snowflake Summit, debuting combined agentic-workflow and orchestration innovations plus dbt Core v2.0; booth #2313.

items.headline: FalkorDB exhibits Snowflake-native graph engine at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Lodge Booth 2719)
items.summary: FalkorDB was a Lodge Partner at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 2719), showcasing its Snowflake Native App that turns warehouse tables into Cypher-queryable knowledge graphs for GraphRAG.

items.headline: Meta Integration Technology sponsors Snowflake Summit 2026, demos MetaKarta Semantic Hub for Snowflake Cortex
items.summary: Summit 2026 sponsor demoing MetaKarta Semantic Hub as a governed semantic control plane that brings consistent business meaning to Snowflake Cortex AI.

items.headline: Revefi showcases AI FinOps and AI Data Engineer at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Revefi exhibits at booth 1410, demoing its AI agent for Snowflake cost optimization, performance and data quality at Summit 26.

items.headline: Seemore Data runs $5,000 Snowflake savings challenge at Summit 2026
items.summary: At Summit 26 booth #2521, Seemore offers a challenge: cut Snowflake costs 20%+ or pay $5,000; promotion runs through June 2026.

items.headline: FreedomPay showcases payment orchestration and Snowflake partnership at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 2612)
items.summary: FreedomPay exhibited at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 2612), highlighting its payment orchestration platform and partnership with Snowflake.

items.headline: Hexaware at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth #2419) showcasing Amaze for Data and AI
items.summary: Hexaware at Snowflake Summit 2026 Booth #2419, showcasing BI-to-AI-ready data journeys and its Amaze Snowflake migration and optimization solutions.

items.headline: MessageGears hosts 'Turn your warehouse into your marketing engine' session at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Warehouse-native ESP MessageGears is at Summit 2026 promoting direct Snowflake activation; also named 'one to watch' in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack report.

items.headline: Braze named Snowflake 2026 APJ Product Growth Partner of the Year; launches user profile streaming for Snowflake
items.summary: Braze won a 2026 Snowflake Partner Award and introduced real-time user profile streaming to Snowflake for a 360-degree customer view.

items.headline: Capgemini named 2026 EMEA Snowflake Services Innovation Partner of the Year
items.summary: At Summit 2026 Snowflake named Capgemini EMEA Services Innovation Partner of the Year; its kipi.ai unit won Telecom Services Partner of the Year.

items.headline: Prefect Launches Workflow Orchestration Offering on Snowflake Marketplace
items.summary: Prefect partnered with Snowflake, listing its workflow orchestration on Snowflake Marketplace and connecting AI agents to Snowflake via FastMCP and Horizon MCP Gateway.

items.headline: Sifflet brings end-to-end data observability and AI agents to Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Sifflet exhibits at Booth #1507, highlighting column-level lineage and three AI observability agents acting as a control plane for Snowflake data.

items.headline: Snowplow named a Leader in Snowflake's 2026 Modern Marketing Data Stack Report
items.summary: Snowplow named a Leader in Snowflake's 2026 Modern Marketing Data Stack Report for a second year; partnership expanded via Snowplow Signals on Snowflake.

items.headline: 7Rivers at Snowflake Summit 2026 with live Snowflake Intelligence demos and June 2 networking reception
items.summary: Snowflake data consultancy 7Rivers exhibits at Summit 2026 showing Snowflake Intelligence and data agents, plus a June 2 happy-hour reception for data leaders.

items.headline: Acceldata showcases data observability for Snowflake at Summit 2026 (booth #1607)
items.summary: Acceldata exhibits its multidimensional data observability platform for Snowflake at Summit 2026 booth #1607, covering anomaly detection, reliability and spend forecasting.

items.headline: Acxiom named customer partner for Snowflake Horizon Catalog AI security at Summit 2026
items.summary: Acxiom highlighted alongside NewDay and Thomson Reuters in Snowflake's Summit 2026 Horizon Catalog launch, exploring new AI security and governance for agentic systems.

items.headline: Airbyte named Integration leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack 2026, partner at Summit 2026
items.summary: Airbyte recognized as an Integration leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack 2026 report and participates as a partner at Snowflake Summit 2026.

items.headline: Altimate AI CEO speaks at Snowflake Summit 2026 on why production AI agents fall short
items.summary: Co-founder/CEO Pradnesh Patil presents at Snowflake Summit 2026 on context, governance and infrastructure gaps; Altimate's agentic data-engineering platform supports Snowflake.

items.headline: Amperity at Snowflake Summit 2026 (booth #1317) on unified customer data for AI
items.summary: Amperity exhibits at Snowflake Summit 2026 booth #1317, showing how unified customer data on Snowflake powers AI, analytics and personalized engagement.

items.headline: Astronomer at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Astronomer presents Summit 2026 sessions on Apache Airflow unifying data pipelines and AI workflows, plus runtime governance and a networking takeover event.

items.headline: Join Atlan at Snowflake Summit 2026 | Booth #1612
items.summary: Atlan showcases its open context layer at Summit 2026 booth #1612, giving AI agents and Snowflake Cortex governed business context for production use.

items.headline: CARTO brings agentic GIS to Snowflake using Cortex Code
items.summary: CARTO details agentic geospatial analysis in Snowflake via Cortex Code, extending its Snowflake Native App spatial analytics around Summit 2026.

items.headline: CData at Snowflake Summit 2026 (booth #2738) showcasing Sync and Connect AI for Cortex agents
items.summary: CData exhibits at Summit 2026, demoing CData Sync into Snowflake and Connect AI giving Cortex agents live, governed access to external sources.

items.headline: Chalk makes Snowflake Summit 2026 debut with real-time feature store deep dive
items.summary: Chalk's first Summit appearance (booth #2611); co-founder Elliot Marx presents building a real-time feature store with sub-5ms inference in Snowflake.

items.headline: Domo showcases Snowflake Native App and Cortex-powered Marketing Mix Modeling at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: At Summit 2026 (booth #1610) Domo demoed a production Marketing Mix Modeling solution with a Snowflake Native App fully integrated into Cortex AI.

items.headline: Meet DQLabs at Snowflake Summit 2026, Booth #2739 - See PRIZM Live
items.summary: DQLabs presents PRIZM, its AI-native data quality and observability platform on Snowflake, at Summit 2026 booth #2739, demoing anomaly detection and automated remediation.

items.headline: Honeydew integrates its semantic layer with Snowflake Semantic Views; Snowflake Native App at Summit 2026 Booth #2412
items.summary: Honeydew extends its semantic layer onto Snowflake's new Semantic Views (Cortex semantic models), available as a Snowflake Native App; exhibiting at Summit 2026.

items.headline: Infosys Topaz at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth #1315)
items.summary: Infosys showcases Topaz AI offerings and agentic AI solutions built on Snowflake at Summit 2026 via sessions and booth presence.

items.headline: Mastek showcases Snowflake-native Galaxy Suite at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 2614)
items.summary: Mastek exhibits at Summit 26 booth 2614, showcasing its Snowflake-native Galaxy Suite for data modernization, Cortex analytics, and enterprise AI products.

items.headline: Pantomath deepens Snowflake AI Data Cloud integration, exhibits at Snowflake Summit 2026 (Booth 2307)
items.summary: Data observability vendor at Summit 26 booth 2307, deepening Snowflake AI Data Cloud integration alongside a Snowflake Ventures investment and AI DRE Agent.

items.headline: PointFive brings DeepWaste detection and Warehouse Optimization for Snowflake to Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Cloud-efficiency vendor at Summit 26 showcasing DeepWaste for Data Platforms and Snowflake Warehouse Optimization with agentic remediation of cost issues.

items.headline: Precisely at Snowflake Summit 26: Closing the Agentic AI Data Integrity Gap
items.summary: Data-integrity vendor at Summit 26 booth 1212 with a June 2 session on preparing Snowflake data for agentic AI ROI via accuracy, enrichment, and governance.

items.headline: Meet Wipro at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Wipro sponsored Summit 26, showcasing agentic AI via WEGA and Snowflake Cortex AI plus client use cases across supply chain, financial services and healthcare.

items.headline: Alation at Snowflake Summit 2026 (booth #1303) with attendee session guide
items.summary: Alation exhibits at Snowflake Summit 2026 booth #1303 and publishes a guide to dates, keynotes and sessions for the governed agentic-AI theme.

items.headline: Alteryx at Snowflake Summit 2026 showing in-Snowflake analytics with built-in governance
items.summary: Alteryx joins Snowflake Summit 2026 to demonstrate AI-driven analytics running directly inside Snowflake without moving data, with governance built in.

items.headline: DataOps.live hosts partner event at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: DataOps.live is a partner-hosted event sponsor at Snowflake Summit 2026 (drinks/food at The Chieftain Irish Pub); ongoing Snowflake Native App and Cortex partnership.

items.headline: Reltio at Snowflake Summit 2026 (sponsor/booth presence)
items.summary: Reltio is a Snowflake Summit 26 sponsor (June 1-4, San Francisco), showcasing Reltio Data Cloud for unifying data/metadata into trusted 360 views for AI agents. No product launch.

items.headline: DataHub launches DataHub Cloud release giving analytics agents trusted context, showcased at Snowflake Summit
items.summary: DataHub Cloud adds a context layer for agents like Snowflake Intelligence to push accuracy past 90%; showcased at Snowflake Summit 26 (Booth 1309).

items.headline: Gray Swan raises $40M Series A with Snowflake Ventures; runtime AI protection integrated natively into Snowflake
items.summary: Snowflake Ventures backed Gray Swan's $40M Series A; partnership embeds Gray Swan's runtime AI security natively into Snowflake's AI ecosystem.

items.headline: Unravel Data Launches Arvix AI to Autonomously Optimize Databricks, Snowflake and BigQuery
items.summary: Unravel unveiled Arvix AI, an agentic engine that autonomously tunes and optimizes Snowflake (and Databricks/BigQuery) workloads, days before Summit 26.

items.headline: Snowflake Expands AWS Collaboration with $6B Commitment to Accelerate Enterprise Agentic AI Adoption
items.summary: Ahead of and demonstrated at Summit 26, Snowflake and AWS expanded their collaboration with a $6B Snowflake infrastructure commitment to accelerate enterprise agentic AI.

items.headline: Hex featured as customer in Snowflake's $6B AWS collaboration expansion at Summit 2026
items.summary: Hex CTO Caitlin Colgrove quoted in Snowflake's expanded $6B AWS agentic-AI collaboration; Hex relies on Snowflake on AWS for governed enterprise AI.

items.headline: Informatica Brings Headless Data Management and Iceberg Governance to Snowflake
items.summary: Informatica unveiled Headless IDMC for Cortex AI agents, GA row-level access governance, and Iceberg table scanners for Snowflake ahead of Summit 2026.

items.headline: AVEVA and Snowflake Forge Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Industrial AI and Unify IT/OT Data Ecosystems
items.summary: AVEVA and Snowflake announced a zero-copy integration between CONNECT and Snowflake, demonstrated at Summit 26, unifying IT/OT data for industrial AI.

items.headline: DataRadar Expands Platform with Native Data Quality and Cost Optimization App on Snowflake Marketplace
items.summary: DataRadar launched a Snowflake native app for data quality and cost optimization on the Marketplace, running inside customers' Snowflake; meeting attendees at Summit 2026.

items.headline: Dataiku Launches Cobuild on Snowflake: From Prompt to Production-Ready AI Workflow, Inside Snowflake
items.summary: Dataiku launched Cobuild on Snowflake, turning natural-language prompts into governed AI workflows and agents inside Snowflake using Cortex models; also named 2026 Snowflake AI Platform Partner of the Year.

items.headline: Tealium Launches Audience Discovery for Snowflake as a Native App to Power Real-Time Customer Activation
items.summary: Tealium Audience Discovery for Snowflake, a Native App letting customers build/govern/activate audiences in-place; on Snowflake Marketplace in Q2. Booth #1414 at Summit.

items.headline: SAP and Snowflake reach GA on bidirectional zero-copy integration for enterprise AI
items.summary: SAP Business Data Cloud Connect for Snowflake reaches GA with bidirectional zero-copy SAP data integration; reaffirmed at Summit 26.

items.headline: Your Data is Ready, Your AI Can Be Too: Perficient at Snowflake Summit 2026
items.summary: Snowflake Premier and Cortex Code Preferred Partner at Summit 26 booth 2422 with live Cortex Code demos across financial services, retail, manufacturing, and healthcare.

items.headline: Boomi Agent Control Tower adds Snowflake Cortex provider; Unified Server Catalog ingests Snowflake MCP servers
items.summary: Boomi, a Snowflake Elite Partner at Summit 2026, adds Snowflake Cortex as an Agent Control Tower provider and surfaces Snowflake MCP servers in its catalog.

items.headline: Tealium recognized in Snowflake's 2026 Modern Marketing Data Stack for powering real-time engagement via bi-directional data flows
items.summary: Tealium named to Snowflake's 2026 Modern Marketing Data Stack report for enabling real-time, bi-directional customer data flows with Snowflake.

items.headline: GrowthArc earns Snowflake Cortex Code Preferred Partner Badge for 2026
items.summary: GrowthArc among select global partners awarded Snowflake's Cortex Code Preferred Partner Badge; also hosting a Snowflake Summit 2026 sidelines dinner.

items.headline: OneTrust embeds consent signals into Snowflake Data Clean Rooms for consent-aware data collaboration
items.summary: OneTrust's 2026 Snowflake collaboration embeds consent signals into Snowflake Data Clean Rooms, making user consent enforceable across multi-party data collaboration.

items.headline: Sparq achieves Snowflake Elite Partner status for AI Data Cloud Services
items.summary: Sparq reached Snowflake's Elite Partner tier in 2026, building workloads inside Cortex, Native Apps and ML; also launched Sparq Intelligence Studio in February.

items.headline: Sundial Joins Snowflake & Industry Leaders to Support Data + AI Interoperability Through the Open Semantic Interchange
items.summary: Sundial joins Snowflake-led Open Semantic Interchange (OSI), an open, vendor-neutral semantic-model spec standardizing data definitions across BI, AI and governance tools.

items.headline: Matillion Launches Maia's Migration Agent: Autonomous Migration for Legacy ETL Platforms
items.summary: Matillion's new Maia Migration Agent autonomously converts legacy ETL pipelines into native, warehouse-optimized pipelines on Snowflake, Databricks, and Redshift.

items.headline: TEKsystems Global Services Partners With Snowflake To Accelerate AI-Driven Energy Solutions
items.summary: TEKsystems Global Services named a Snowflake Energy Solutions Launch Partner to help oil, gas, power and utilities modernize with AI-powered insights.

items.headline: Snowflake and OpenAI Forge $200 Million Partnership to Bring Enterprise-Ready AI to the World's Most Trusted Data Platform
items.summary: Multi-year $200M partnership making OpenAI frontier models natively available in Snowflake Cortex AI; co-developing agents over governed data, spotlighted at Summit 26.

items.headline: Hakkoda partners with Snowflake to launch Snowflake's Energy Solutions for AI-driven energy operations
items.summary: Hakkoda and Snowflake collaborate to launch Snowflake Energy Solutions, unifying IT/OT/IoT data and applying AI for oil, gas, power and utilities.

items.headline: Snowflake brings Google's Gemini 3 to Snowflake Cortex AI, expanding partnership
items.summary: Gemini 3 natively available in Snowflake Cortex AI; expanded go-to-market alignment, co-sell, and Google Cloud Marketplace transactability.
